query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'registrations' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%photo%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%country%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%region%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%nation%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%profile%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'registrations' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%photo%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%country%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%region%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%nation%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%profile%');
